===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# [[knack]]; [[secret]]; [[trick of the trade]]
# [[mnemonic]] [[chant]]; [[rhyme]] for [[remembering]] something; rhymed [[formula]]
# to [[take leave]] of; to [[bid]] [[farewell]]
# {{lb|zh|obsolete}} to bid farewell to a [[dead]] [[person]]
